name: waku
description: Create, adapt, publish and edit mobile playable web content with Waku. Bundles the Waku creation + adaptation skills, an offline session template, a CLI operations skill, and the Waku multimodal MCP server.

interface.shortDescription: Create & publish mobile playables on Waku
interface.longDescription: Waku creator toolkit for Codex: scaffold a new mobile playable from the bundled platform template (waku skill), or adapt an existing local game through that same template contract (waku-adapt skill), then build and publish to your Waku Feed via the waku CLI (waku-cli skill). Multimodal asset generation runs through the bundled Waku MCP server.
